chunks.text: Eric Paulos engages in Living Room Light Exchange - EECS at Berkeley Prof. Eric Paulos is featured in an East Bay Express article titled “ Living Room Light Exchange Salon Series: Where Tech and Art Converge ”. At the intersection of technology and art, the “Living Room Light Exchange” is a 2 year old salon series in which some 40 intellectual tech workers and artists gather in various living rooms for discussions in which art and tech are not assumed to be inherently opposed. Prof. Paulos gave a presentation about possibilities of technologies that function like works of art, such as “Energy Parasites:” toylike devices that stick onto busses, escalators, and public fountains, harvesting their energy for later uses, such as charging one’s phone. Categories Faculty Research View Open Faculty Positions
